scripts.dev:all: npm run docker:up && concurrently -k -n ACCESS,ASSET -c blue,green "npm run dev:access" "npm run dev:asset"
scripts.docker:up: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d asset-db access-db
scripts.docker:migrate: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --profile migration run --rm flyway-asset && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --profile migration run --rm flyway-access
